name: Atwell on Spring
bathroomsNote: 1-2 bathrooms depending on unit; 2BR units include 2-bath configurations

notes.concierge: Multiple independent listing sources (apartmentlist.com, search summaries) explicitly state 24/7 concierge; official atwellonspring.com/services page was inaccessible. Leasing office hours are weekday/weekend daytime only, but concierge staffing appears separate and 24-hour per resident-facing descriptions.
notes.petPolicy: Dogs and cats welcome; max 2 per unit; $300 deposit; $50/month fee for cats; dogs subject to breed restrictions and must provide vaccination records
notes.climate: Air conditioning listed as a unit feature across multiple sources; treated as in-unit controlled
notes.wellMaintained: Building is new (opened 2024) and generally described as well-maintained physically; concierge praised in early reviews. One resident reported a rodent issue in late summer 2025. Insufficient review volume to call definitively.
notes.transit: Downtown Silver Spring; walkable to Silver Spring Metro (Red Line)
notes.den: 1BR+Den floor plan confirmed (B1.1 Den, 866 sq ft, from ~$2,838/mo)
